shops.name: Falador General Store
shops.description: The Falador General Store mainly consists of useful low level items. It is the first building on the west side when entering through the north gate. The ground floor of the general store contains the shop keeper and the shop assistant.

shops.name: Flynn's Mace Market
shops.description: Flynn's Mace Market is a mace shop owned by Flynn in Falador. It is located between the Falador General Store and the Hairdresser in the north-western part of the city.

shops.name: Cassie's Shield Shop
shops.description: Cassie's Shield Shop is a specialty shop owned by Cassie that sells shields. It is located in Falador, just west of the park and south-east of the northern gate of the city.

shops.name: Herquin's Gems
shops.description: Herquin's Gems is located on the west side of Falador, just south of the west bank. It is owned by Herquin.

shops.name: Wayne's Chains
shops.description: Wayne's Chains is a shop owned by Wayne located in southern Falador. It is the only shop that specialises exclusively in chainbodies.

shops.name: Betty's Magic Emporium
shops.description: Betty's Magic Emporium is located in Port Sarim and owned by Betty. Free players must visit this store to buy an eye of newt for the Witch's Potion quest.

shops.name: Brian's Battleaxe Bazaar
shops.description: Brian's Battleaxe Bazaar is located in Port Sarim and owned by Brian. It is one of the two battleaxe stores in RuneScape - the other is located in Lumbridge. The shop stocks battleaxes from bronze to adamant.

shops.name: Grum's Gold Exchange
shops.description: Grum's Gold Exchange is located in Port Sarim and operated by Grum. The store buys and sells many kinds of unenchanted jewellery, though it does not deal in dragonstone, onyx, or zenyte jewellery or bracelets. It is one of only two jewellery stores in RuneScape (the other being Conara's Jewels), and

shops.name: Sarah's Farming Shop
shops.description: Sarah's Farming shop is a Farming shop at Sarah's farm south of Falador that sells various Farming items and buys certain crops.

shops.name: Gerrant's Fishy Business
shops.description: Gerrant's Fishy Business is located in Port Sarim. The shop sells Fishing supplies. It is run by Gerrant.

shops.name: Wydin's Food Store
shops.description: The Food Store, operated by Wydin, sells a variety of fresh food, and is located in Port Sarim. It plays a notable role in the Pirate's Treasure quest - it is the drop off point between Karamja and Asgarnia to find the otherwise illegal beverage Karamjan rum, after smuggling it from Karamja.

shops.name: Rimmington General Store
shops.description: The Rimmington General Store is a general store in Rimmington. It is run by the shop keeper and his assistant. The shop is most notable for being the location of Phials, who is often used in conjunction with the nearby POH portal for fast Construction and Prayer training.

shops.name: Rommik's Crafty Supplies
shops.description: Rommik's Crafty Supplies is located in Rimmington and owned by Rommik. It is a convenient place to buy Crafting supplies due to its close proximity to the Crafting Guild.

shops.name: Dommik's Crafting Store
shops.description: Dommik's Crafting Store is a Crafting supplies store owned by Dommik located in north-eastern Al Kharid. It is a convenient place to buy Crafting supplies due to its close proximity to a bank and a tanner.

shops.name: Brian's Archery Supplies
shops.description: Brian's Archery Supplies is a Ranged supplies shop owned by Brian and located in Rimmington.

shops.name: Lowe's Archery Emporium
shops.description: Lowe's Archery Emporium is located near central Varrock just east of the main square. This store is operated by Lowe.

shops.name: The Toad and Chicken
shops.description: The Toad and Chicken is a bar and an inn found in Burthorpe, north of Taverley. It caters primarily to the soldiers and citizens of Burthorpe. Wizard's mind bomb, Dwarven stout and Asgarnian ale are all purchasable from Tostig for two coins each. Players can also find a trapdoor leading to the Rogue

shops.name: Gaius' Two Handed Shop
shops.description: Gaius' Two Handed Shop is a shop in Taverley owned by Gaius that has a variety of two-handed swords ranging from bronze to adamant. This store does not sell the rune or dragon two-handed sword. It can be used as an easy source for the adamant two-handed sword needed for a hard emote clue scroll.

shops.name: Jatix's Herblore Shop
shops.description: Jatix's Herblore Shop is a shop in Taverley owned by Jatix that sells Herblore supplies. This shop sells empty vials and eyes of newt in packs.

shops.name: Nurmof's Pickaxe Shop
shops.description: Nurmof's Pickaxe Shop is located in the north-west cul-de-sac of the Dwarven Mine, accessed through the alley with the anvil, south-west from the north entrance. Alternatively, a disk of returning can be used anywhere within the mine to teleport players south west of the cul-de-sac entrance.

shops.name: Drogo's Mining Emporium
shops.description: Drogo's Mining Emporium is located in the Dwarven Mines, run by Drogo. Although labelled as a mining shop, it only sells hammers and bronze pickaxes. It does provide a place for players to sell their ores or bars, but it is relatively unpopular due to its inconvenient location.

shops.name: Crossbow Shop (Dwarven Mine)
shops.description: Hura's Crossbow Shop is a Crossbow stall run by Hura in the Dwarven Mine. It sells crossbow components, and has the same stock and prices as the White Wolf Mountain Crossbow Shop.

shops.name: Dwarven Shopping Store
shops.description: The Dwarven shopping store is a general store run by a dwarf in the Dwarven Mine. It is almost never visited, mainly because of its location; there are many general stores nearby (such as the ones in Falador or Edgeville) which are much easier to reach.
